zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Rehm於1340年2月10日出生在可特格希 貝也時，他的父親Johannes Rehm I.22歲，母親Anna Goldochs20歲。他於1365年3月10日與Catharina Bach在德國貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1411年7月10日在他的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Rehm于1340年2月10日出生在可特格希 貝也时，他的父亲Johannes Rehm I.22岁，母亲Anna Goldochs20岁。他于1365年3月10日与Catharina Bach在德国貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1411年7月10日在他的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rehm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Otto, Armin, Hans, Gunter, Hermann, Lothar, Oskar.
German: from the medieval personal name Rehm (see Remy ).
German: from Middle High German reme ‘frame, loom, rack’, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who made or used such items.

variants.name: Rahm
meanings: German:

topographic name from Middle High German, Middle Low German rām(e) ‘end, target, mark’, or a habitational name from any of several places in Westphalia and Rhineland named with this word. This surname (in any of the possible senses; see also below) is also found in France (Alsace).
from Middle High German, Middle Low German rām ‘soot’, possibly a metonymic occupational name for a blacksmith or charcoal burner, or a nickname for a dirty person.

variants.name: Rohm
meanings: German:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Ruom (Old High German hruom ‘fame’), a short form of Ruombald and similar personal names containing this element.
(Röhm): variant of Rehm . Compare Roehm .

variants.name: Rhem
meanings: Americanized form of German Rehm or its variant Remm. This surname is found mainly among African Americans.

History: The progenitor of many of the Rhems was Melcher Rhem (or, as spelled in the surviving documents, Remm) from Germany, who died in 1768 in Craven County, NC. He had three sons, all surnamed Rhem.

variants.name: Remy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Jean-Claude, Evens, Germaine, Gisele, Henri, Hugues, Jacques, Jean Raymond, Jean-Daniel, Josee, Laurent.

French (Rémy); West Indian (in Haiti, Martinique, and Guadeloupe Rémy); Walloon and German: from a French personal name which represents a falling together of two distinct Latin names: Remigius (a derivative of remex, genitive remigis ‘rower, oarsman’), and Remedius (from remedium ‘cure, remedy’). The former name was borne by a 6th-century bishop of Rheims; the latter was borne by various other Christian saints of the 8th to 10th centuries. Compare Ramey , Reamy , and Rhamy .

History: The surname Rémy of French origin is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors, once along with its altered forms Ramey and Remey, and once along with the variant de Rémi and altered forms Reamy and Remey. It is also listed in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of Huguenot ancestors was Jacques Rémy, born c. 1630 in France, who by 1672 lived in Westmoreland County, VA, where he died in 1721. Many of his descendants bear the surname Ramey , some also Rhamy . — Léopold Rémy dit Bellefleur from Biécourt in the Vosges married Marie-Angélique Trudel in L'Ange-Gardien, QC, in 1758.

variants.name: Roehm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Klaus, Eberhard, Gerhard.
German (Röhm): variant of Rehm . Compare Rohm 2.

variants.name: Rem
meanings: German: perhaps an altered form of   Rehm  .
American shortened form of Polish Rembowski: unexplained.
Dutch: from the personal name Rem, a short form of Remmert or Rembert .

variants.name: Rehmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt.
North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a marshy place, from Middle Low German red ‘bog’ + man ‘man’.
North German: variant of Rehm 2, with the addition of Middle Low German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Vernacular form of   Johannes .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Rehm was born on 10 February 1340, in Bavaria, his father, Johannes Rehm I., was 22 and his mother, Anna Goldochs, was 20. He married Catharina Bach on 10 March 1365, in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 10 July 1411, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Rehm est né le 10 février 1340, à Königreich Bayern, son père, Johannes Rehm I., avait 22 ans et sa mère, Anna Goldochs, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catharina Bach le 10 mars 1365, à Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1411, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Rehm am 10. Februar 1340 in Königreich Bayern geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johannes Rehm I. 22 und seine Mutter Anna Goldochs 20. Er hat am 10. März 1365 in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland Catharina Bach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Juli 1411 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Rehm è nato il il 10 febbraio 1340 nel Königreich Bayern, il suo padre, Johannes Rehm I., aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Anna Goldochs, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catharina Bach il 10 marzo 1365, nel Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 luglio 1411, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Rehmが1340年2月10日にクoニグレイチ バイエルンで生まれた時，父Johannes Rehm I.は22歳，母Anna Goldochsは20歳であった。1365年3月10日にドイツバイエルンアウグスブルグアウグスブルグでCatharina Bachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年7月10日に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann Rehm(이)가 1340년 2월 10일 ko니그레이치 베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johannes Rehm I.(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Goldochs(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1365년 3월 10일 독일 베이른 오그스버그 오그스버그에서 Catharina Bach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 7월 10일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.10. Februar 1340–10. Juli 1411: 1340 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 10–1411 оны Долоодугаар сарын 10

pt.10. Februar 1340–10. Juli 1411: 10 de fevereiro de 1340–10 de julho de 1411
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Rehm nasceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1340, em Königreich Bayern, seu pai, Johannes Rehm I., tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Anna Goldochs, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catharina Bach em 10 de março de 1365, em Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1411, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Rehm родился 10 февраля 1340 г. в местности кoниграич беиирн, его отцу по имени Johannes Rehm I. было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Goldochs, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catharina Bach 10 марта 1365 г. в местности аугсбург, аугсбург, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 июля 1411 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

es.10. Februar 1340–10. Juli 1411: 10 de febrero de 1340–10 de julio de 1411
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Rehm nació el 10 de febrero de 1340, en Königreich Bayern, su papá, Johannes Rehm I., tenía 22 años y su mamá, Anna Goldochs, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Catharina Bach el 10 de marzo de 1365, en Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de julio de 1411, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
